name: Hero Pumps — Plumbing / Engineering Contractor
subject: Pump specs for your next project
body:
Hi {contact_name},

Saw {company_name} has been handling some solid commercial HVAC projects in {country}. Thought our circulator pumps might be worth a look.

We're a direct factory in China — ErP compliant (EEI ≤ 0.23), TÜV certified. Our European contractor clients typically save 30%+ on pump costs vs. buying through local distributors.

Want me to send over a quick spec sheet for your current project?
